pi_items.source: Drupal machine name conventions require lowercase letters, digits, and underscores; this follows standard Drupal naming patterns
Drupal field naming convention requires 'field_' prefix followed by machine name; verified in Drupal documentation
Standard e-commerce category verified on Amazon and major electronics retailers as category for audio products and headphones
Standard e-commerce category verified on CDW and Best Buy; includes mice, keyboards, monitors, and other PC accessories
Standard e-commerce category verified on Amazon and electronics retailers for smart home devices
Standard e-commerce category verified on Amazon and Best Buy for photography equipment and cameras
Sony WH-1000XM5 confirmed as real wireless headphones product; appropriate category match via Sony specification documentation and Amazon product listing
Logitech MX Master 3S confirmed as real wireless mouse product; appropriate category match via Logitech official website specification
Product found in seed_products.php with exact title, SKU SONY-WH1000XM5, price 348.00; verified as real product with Sony official specs
Product found in seed_products.php with exact title, SKU LOGI-MXM3S, price 99.99; verified as real product with Logitech official specs

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a Drupal Commerce e-commerce platform with two real products pre-seeded: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones (348.00 USD) and Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse (99.99 USD). The metadata defines creating a taxonomy vocabulary named 'product_categories' with four standard e-commerce category terms: Audio & Headphones, Computer Peripherals, Smart Home, and Cameras & Photography. Two products are assigned to categories: Sony headphones to Audio & Headphones and Logitech mouse to Computer Peripherals. A new Entity Reference field named 'field_category' must be added to the Product entity type (not Product Variation) to enable category assignments. All metadata values follow standard Drupal naming conventions and represent reasonable e-commerce categorization.
